summary: Frontend-only testing of Hotel Service Management System V2. Supabase is paused causing AbortError after ~12s, but UI handles gracefully showing error banners. All core UI tests passed. localStorage key used by app is 'currentUser' (not 'hotel_user' as noted in request).

minor.issue: Supabase paused — all DB calls return AbortError after 12s. App shows AbortError message in error banner (expected behavior).

ui_bugs.issue: Invalid login shows no visible error message after form submission — Supabase times out after 12s with no user-facing feedback until timeout. Error state may not show promptly.
Logout button is an icon-only button with no visible 'Logout' text label — may confuse users. Refresh button also icon-only.

issues: AbortError banner displayed prominently — could be styled more as 'data unavailable' instead of raw error message

action_items: Add user-facing error message for login failures that appears before Supabase timeout (e.g., loading state + timeout message)
Consider labeling icon-only buttons on Staff dashboard (Logout, Refresh) with accessible aria-labels or tooltips
Replace raw 'AbortError: This operation was aborted' with user-friendly 'Unable to load data. Please try again.' message
critical_code_review_comments: localStorage key in mock_manager_session in review_request is 'hotel_user' but actual code uses 'currentUser' — documentation mismatch
AbortError is surfaced directly to the user instead of being caught and displayed as a friendly message
test_credentials: localStorage key: 'currentUser'. Manager: {id:1, name:'Test Manager', role:'manager', department_id:1, department_name:'Housekeeping'}. Staff: {id:5, name:'John Cleaner', role:'staff', department_id:1}
context_for_next_testing_agent: App uses localStorage key 'currentUser' for auth. Supabase is paused so all data APIs timeout with AbortError after ~12s. Must wait 15s after page load to see final dashboard state. Login page: email+password form with show/hide toggle. Auth guards work (redirect to /login). Manager dashboard: MANAGER badge, 4 stat cards, MOD Mode CTA, MOD Mode modal fully rendered with Location dropdown, Housekeeping/Maintenance category, Specific Issue dropdown, Notes, Before Photo upload, Dispatch & Notify button. Staff dashboard: mobile-first, shows name + My Assigned Tasks + stats bar (ACTIVE/COMPLETED/URGENT) + empty state. Sidebar shows role-specific links.

test_results.login_error_for_invalid_credentials: PARTIAL - error shows only after 12s Supabase timeout
